tabchannel.client.no_server_sync: §cTabChannel tabs unavailable: server did not sync channels. On Youer/NeoForge, put the §eNeoForge§c TabChannel jar in server/mods (not the Fabric jar). Fabric client = stream chat OK; channels need NeoForge client + server.
tabchannel.client.commands_help: §eFabric client:§r /tabchannel gui, /channel position|resize, /streamchat … — §c/create, /join, /list, /mp§r need the server mod (NeoForge on Youer), not available here.
